fuses.description: (1G2 SIG) Ignition signal & Seat heater fuse

boxDescription: The fuse box is located under the driver’s side of the dashboard. To remove a fuse, use the fuse puller provided in the fuse box.
The main fuse, primary fuses and some of the individual fuses are located in the engine compartment.
